scripts.build: npm run validate:code && npm run build:frontend && npm run check:backend
scripts.dev: node scripts/hnf-dev-preflight.mjs && concurrently -n api,vite,listo -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node scripts/hnf-dev-wait-ready.mjs"
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
